title: Light Chicken Supreme
description: A savory and tender Portuguese dish featuring chicken breast in a light sauce, perfect for lunch or dinner.
instructions: Slice the chicken breasts into thin strips.
Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Add onion, garlic, leek and sauté for about 5 minutes or until softened.
Add chicken strips, salt, pepper, thyme, cayenne pepper to the pan. Stir well and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes or until coated with sauce.
Pour in chicken broth, cover and simmer on low heat for about 10 minutes.
Reduce heat to medium-low, add white wine, heavy cream and bring mixture to a boil then reduce to a simmer. Let it thicken slightly, stirring occasionally.
Serve hot as is or garnish with fresh herbs like parsley or cilantro.
